# 📚 Killo Workspace Index

## Struktur Folder

```
/workspace
├── notes/          # Catatan personal Boss
├── research/       # Hasil research dengan planning
├── extract/        # PDF/Dokumen yang di-extract (markdown)
├── templates/     # Template untuk notes, research, extract
├── scripts/       # Script automation
└── (root)         # File konfigurasi (AGENTS.md, USER.md, dll)
```

## Format File

### 📝 Notes
**Lokasi:** `notes/YYYY-MM-DD-[slug].md`

```markdown
# 📝 Notes: [Judul]

**Tanggal:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Tags:** tag1, tag2

---

## Konten

[Isi note]

---
*Generated by Killo*
```

### 🔍 Research  
**Lokasi:** `research/YYYY-MM-DD-[slug]/README.md`

- Executive Summary
- Tujuan Penelitian
- Metodologi
- Temuan Utama
- Referensi
- Kesimpulan

### 📄 Extract Document
**Lokasi:** `extract/YYYY-MM-DD-[slug].md`

- Ringkasan
- Isi Utama
- Poin Penting
- Metadata

## Cara Penggunaan

| Perintah | Aksi |
|----------|------|
| "Simpan note: [isi]" | Buat note baru |
| "Research: [topik]" | Mulai research |
| "Extract: [URL/nama]" | Extract PDF ke markdown |
| "Sync" | Push semua ke GitHub |
